     The Numbers Business Report

Over Her Dead Body (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $7,570,127Details
International Box Office $14,025,947
Worldwide Box Office $21,596,074
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,709,612
Total $8,709,612
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Devastated when his fiancée Kate is killed on their wedding day, Henry reluctantly agrees to consult a psychic named Ashley at the urging of his sister Chloe. Despite his skepticism over her psychic abilities, Henry finds himself falling hard for Ashley, and vice versa. But there's a big snag. Ashley is being haunted by Kate's ghost, who considers it her heavenly duty to break up Henry and Ashley's fledgling romance, if it's the last thing she does on this earthly plane...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,025,115 (53.2% of total gross)
Legs:1.88 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,977 opening theaters/1,977 max. theaters, 2.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,924,529

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 1st, 2008 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: May 6th, 2008 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content and language.
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Haunting, Relationships Gone Wrong, Wedding Day Disasters
Social setting: Wedding Day
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Gold Circle Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Devastated when his fiancée Kate is killed on their wedding day, Henry reluctantly agrees to consult a psychic named Ashley at the urging of his sister Chloe. Despite his skepticism over her psychic abilities, Henry finds himself falling hard for Ashley, and vice versa. But there's a big snag. Ashley is being haunted by Kate's ghost, who considers it her heavenly duty to break up Henry and Ashley's fledgling romance, if it's the last thing she does on this earthly plane...
